title: 'Eben #0072
definition:
Ebenezer = "stone of help"

 1) memorial stone erected by Samuel to mark where God helped
    Israel to defeat the Philistines - north of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ebenezer = "stone of help"

 1) memorial stone erected by Samuel to mark where God helped
    Israel to defeat the Philistines - north of Jerusalem

    NASB:  stone of the help, a place of unc. location, also a commemorative stone
